description: Systemic corporate fraud, deceptive practices, or illegal financial reporting by board or executive leadership.
Misstatement of financial reports, audit failures, or intentional misclassification of assets.
Bribery, extortion, political lobbying violations, or illegal kickbacks.
Release of pollutants, oil spills, toxic waste dumpings, or ecological habitat destruction.
Exploitative labor, child labor, modern slavery, collective bargaining suppression, or wage theft.
Unconsented surveillance, data leaks, customer tracking abuses, or failure to secure personal identifiable info.
Industrial accidents, hazardous working environments, lack of protective equipment, or fatalities.
Harassment, ethical breaches, insider trading, or abuse of power by high-level management.
